assertion_results.text: JQL queries use the project key (TC) and vulnerability issue type ID (10024) from the Security Configuration in claude-md-security-config.md — not hardcoded values
assertion_results.evidence: In discovery-listing.md, both JQL queries use 'project = TC AND issuetype = 10024'. The security config in claude-md-security-config.md specifies 'Project key: TC' (line 19) and 'Vulnerability issue type ID: 10024' (line 49), confirming these values are drawn from the config rather than hardcoded.

assertion_results.text: Two separate queries are constructed: one for untriaged issues (labels NOT IN ai-cve-triaged) and one for triaged-but-new issues (labels IN ai-cve-triaged AND status = New)
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md contains two separate JQL queries: Query 1 (line 9-11) uses 'labels NOT IN (ai-cve-triaged)' for untriaged issues, and Query 2 (line 36-37) uses 'labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status = New' for triaged-but-new issues.

assertion_results.text: Results are grouped into two clearly separated lists: Untriaged issues and Triaged but still New issues
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md has two distinct sections: '## Query 1: Untriaged Issues' (line 7) listing 4 issues, and '## Query 2: Triaged but still New' (line 32) listing 1 issue (TC-9010). Sections are separated by horizontal rules.

assertion_results.text: Each listed issue shows: issue key, status, CVE ID (from labels), summary, and created date
assertion_results.evidence: All tables in discovery-listing.md have columns: Key, Status, CVE ID, Summary, Created. For example, line 20: 'TC-9001 | New | CVE-2026-40112 | h2 - HTTP/2 rapid reset vulnerability [rhtpa-2.2] | 2026-06-08'. All five required fields are present for every listed issue (TC-9001, TC-9002, TC-9004, TC-9003, TC-9010).

assertion_results.text: Status-aware handling: New issues (TC-9001, TC-9002, TC-9004) are presented for full triage, while the In Progress issue (TC-9003) triggers a warning about active work
assertion_results.evidence: In status-handling.md: TC-9001, TC-9002, TC-9004 are listed under '## New Issues -- Full Triage' (line 7) with action 'Proceed with full triage (default path)'. TC-9003 is listed under '## In Progress Issue -- Active Work Warning' (line 25) with explicit warning: 'Warning: This issue is already in `In Progress`. It may be actively worked on.' (line 31).
